visual_description:
The audio opens with a low, ominous, and suspenseful musical score that creates a sense of tension and anticipation. The scene opens on two men in a dimly lit, confined space, possibly a vehicle or a control room. Both men are wearing light-colored, button-down shirts and large, black over-ear headphones. The man on the left, who is slightly out of focus, looks intently forward. The man on the right is in sharper focus, looking down with a concerned expression as he adjusts his headphones. In the foreground, the back of a third person's head and shoulder is visible, silhouetted against the light. The background is dark and indistinct, with a greenish wall and some faint, shadowy shapes. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible in the upper left corner. The camera is positioned in a medium close-up, focusing on the two men in the center of the frame.

The camera cuts to a close-up of a man in a dark suit and tie. He has a serious, focused expression and is looking slightly off-camera. He also wears a small, black earpiece in his right ear. The background is a blurry, neutral gray, suggesting an indoor, possibly industrial or office-like
